Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt
Off Calendar Jun-11-2002 Continued To Jun-19-02 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Andrew M. Zacks, Esq. 956-8100 for receiver & moving party James Baron; David Replogle, Esq. 362-4700 for deft & opposing party Martin Eng; Ira Jacobowitz, Esq. 510/834-0400 for subpoenaed witnesses Thomas Eng & Sau Eng (parents of Martin Eng).
RULING: Order to show cause re contempt hearing held. Witnesses James H. Baron, receiver, and deft Martin Eng both sworn and examined.
"Order imposing preliminary injunction regarding appointment of receiver to collect rents and take possession of and maintain property" filed on 04/10/02 marked as receiver's exhibit 1; chart re "deposits/prepaid rents due from Eng" marked as receiver's exhibit 2;
letter dated 06/10/02 from Mr. Zacks to Mr. Jacobowitz marked as deft's exhibit A.
Court continues the matter to 06/19/02 at 10:30am. P&A's and declaration to be filed 06/14 and reply to be filed 06/17; status report to be filed 06/14 and reply to be filed 06/17. Witnesses excused but ordered to return on 06/19 and all other subpoenaed witnesses ordered to be available. (AJR/PB)

Tro/Prelim Injun & Appoint Receiver
Off Calendar Apr-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Patric J. Kelly, Esq. 408/341-0234 for pltfs & moving parties; Edward B. Simpson, Esq. 391-4900 for deft & opposing party Martin Eng.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion for appointment of receiver and preliminary injunction without prejudice. Order signed in open court. (JH)
